markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the future pricing and packaging strategy for CheckThat and the new OS.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Blocked:** CheckThat upsell plans are on hold, pending clarification from leadership (Marcel, Daniel) on the new OS's packaging.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Critical Question:** Is CheckThat a standalone product or a mandatory, bundled feature within the new OS? This decision dictates the entire go-to-market strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [**Proposed Path:** If bundled, the team will recommend a goodwill gesture: provide CheckThat access to all clients until their renewal, where they will be migrated to the new OS platform.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** Andi will refine a "Launch Readiness Checklist" (starting from Ella's draft) to force leadership to address critical, unanswered questions about the OS launch.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2255.0)

## Topics

### The Strategic Blocker: OS Packaging

  - [**Problem:** Marcel's ELT handbook implies CheckThat is a core component of the new OS.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Strategic Conflict:** This potential bundling directly conflicts with the current plan to upsell CheckThat as a standalone product.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [**Urgency:** A definitive answer is needed before the first client renewals in May to avoid a confusing, two-part pricing conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Proposed Future Scenarios

  - [The team mapped out potential future offerings to force a decision from leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [**Current Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [Services Alone](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [Full Package (OS + Pro CheckThat + Services)](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [Pro/Business CheckThat (with OS access)](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Future Scenarios:**](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [OS + CheckThat + Services](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [OS + Services](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [OS + CheckThat (no services)](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [OS Alone](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [CheckThat Alone (self-serve)](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [Services Alone](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [**Core Question for Leadership:** Is there any scenario where a customer buys OS without CheckThat?](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)

### Path Forward: The Launch Readiness Checklist

  - [**Goal:** Create a comprehensive checklist to force leadership to address all unanswered questions about the OS launch.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2409.0)
  - [**Scope:** The checklist will cover pricing, packaging, support, team readiness, and customer communication.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The team must avoid repeating past launch failures, such as the chaotic AirOps migration where publishing was nearly paused due to poor planning.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

### Team Health Check-in

  - [**Concern:** George is MIA and seems unwell.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2474.0)
  - [**Context:** A recent reinforcement of roles by Marcel may have demoralized George.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2662.0)
  - [**Action:** Ella will follow up with George to check in.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2474.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:** Refine the "Launch Readiness Checklist" (starting from Ella's draft) to force a decision on OS packaging.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2255.0)
  - [**Andi:** Discuss the checklist and future scenarios with Bridget to align on a team recommendation.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Ella:** Follow up with George to check in on his well-being.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2474.0)
  - [**Ella:** Add Andi and William to next Tuesday's client health meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/yKD_BCJ4yXwiRqGSn6rNZZtsPnsVsB9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
